ItacPersonItem.Notes: Riccobono was professor of humanities at the Paduan studio. The most recent contribution on his biography is Griguolo, `Il testamento olografo di Antonio Riccoboni`, in Quaderni per la storia dell`Universita` di Padova, 22-23 (1989-1990), pp. 305-310.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
